---
title: "explanation"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

$$
\textbf{nordWAR (Position Players)} =
\frac{
wRAA + wSB + \text{Fielding} + \text{PosAdj} - R_{\text{rep}}
}{RPW}
$$

$$
\textbf{nordWAR (Pitchers)} =
\text{pitchWAR}
$$

$$
\text{pitchWAR} =
\left(
\frac{RAAP9}{dRPW}
+ \text{RepLevel}
\right)\cdot \frac{IP}{9}
$$

$$
wRAA =
\frac{wOBA - wOBA_{\text{lg}}}{\text{wOBA scale}}\cdot PA
$$

$$
wOBA =
\frac{
w_{BB}BB + w_{HBP}HBP + w_{1B}1B + w_{2B}2B + w_{3B}3B + w_{HR}HR
}{
PA + BB + SF + HBP
}
$$

$$
wSB =
SB\cdot r_{SB} + CS\cdot r_{CS}
- \text{lgwSB}\cdot (1B + BB + HBP)
$$

$$
\text{Fielding} =
(FPct - FPct_{\text{lg}})\cdot 0.8 \cdot G
$$

$$
\text{PosAdj} =
\frac{G}{G_{\text{team}}}
\cdot \text{PosRunValue}
\cdot \frac{G_{\text{season}}}{162}
$$

$$
R_{\text{rep}} =
10 \cdot \frac{G_{\text{season}}}{162}
\cdot \frac{G_{\text{played}}}{G_{\text{season}}}
$$

$$
RPW =
2 \cdot
\left(
\frac{\text{Total Runs}}{\text{Teams} \cdot G_{\text{played}}}
\right)
$$

$$
FIP =
\frac{13HR + 3(BB + HBP) - 2K}{IP}
+ C_{\text{FIP}}
$$

$$
RAAP9 =
FIPR9_{\text{lg}} - FIPR9
$$

$$
dRPW =
\left(
\frac{
(18 - IP/G)\cdot FIPR9_{\text{lg}} + (IP/G)\cdot FIPR9
}{18}
+ 2
\right)\cdot 1.5
$$

$$
\text{RepLevel} =
0.03\left(1 - \frac{GS}{G}\right)
+ 0.12\left(\frac{GS}{G}\right)
$$

---

### \textbf{Definitions}

\begin{enumerate}
\item $wRAA$: Batting runs above league average.
\item $wOBA$: Weighted on-base average.
\item $wSB$: Stolen base runs above average.
\item Fielding: Defensive value vs league-average fielding percentage.
\item PosAdj: Positional adjustment.
\item $R_{\text{rep}}$: Replacement-level runs.
\item $RPW$: Runs per win.
\item $FIP$: Fielding Independent Pitching.
\item $RAAP9$: Runs above average per 9 innings.
\item $dRPW$: Dynamic runs per win.
\item RepLevel: Starter/reliever adjustment.
\item $IP$: Innings pitched.
\end{enumerate}
